zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Treat於1538年8月28日出生在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特時，他的父親Richard Trott30歲，母親Joanna Scadding26歲。他於1563年與Honour Lambert在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1599年2月16日在英國薩默塞特陶頓享年60歲，埋葬在亞特 澤亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Treat于1538年8月28日出生在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特时，他的父亲Richard Trott30岁，母亲Joanna Scadding26岁。他于1563年与Honour Lambert在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1599年2月16日在英国薩默塞特陶頓享年60岁，埋葬在亞特 澤亞。

nameMeanings.name: Treat
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Tritt   or   Trede  .

variants.name: Tritt
meanings: German: apparently from Old High German tretan ‘to step’. However, a South German family of this name are descendants of late 16th-century immigrants from Como, Italy, who bore the name de Triddi.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Treat was born on 28 August 1538, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, his father, Richard Trott, was 30 and his mother, Joanna Scadding, was 26. He married Honour Lambert in 1563, in Pitminster, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 16 February 1599, in Taunton, Somerset, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in At Sea.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Treat est né le 28 août 1538, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Richard Trott, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joanna Scadding, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Honour Lambert en 1563, à Pitminster, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 16 février 1599, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à En mer.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Treat am 28. August 1538 in Pitminster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Trott 30 und seine Mutter Joanna Scadding 26. Er hat 1563 in Pitminster, Somerset, England Honour Lambert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Februar 1599 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Taunton, Somerset, England und wurde in Auf dem Meer begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Treat è nato il il 28 agosto 1538 nel Pitminster, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Richard Trott, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Joanna Scadding, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Honour Lambert nel 1563, nel Pitminster, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 16 febbraio 1599, nel Taunton, Somerset, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a At Sea.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Treatが1538年8月28日にイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターで生まれた時，父Richard Trottは30歳，母Joanna Scaddingは26歳であった。1563年にイギリスソメルセトピトミンスターでHonour Lambertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1599年2月16日にイギリスソメルセトタウントンで60歳で死去し，アト セアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Treat(이)가 1538년 8월 28일 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Trott(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Scadding(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1563년 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 Honour Lambert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1599년 2월 16일 영국 서머세트 타운턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 앳 시에 묻혔다.

pt.28 August 1538–16 February 1599: 28 de agosto de 1538–16 de fevereiro de 1599
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Treat nasceu em 28 de agosto de 1538, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Trott, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Scadding, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Honour Lambert em 1563, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1599, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Em alto mar.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Treat родился 28 августа 1538 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Trott было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Scadding, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Honour Lambert в 1563 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 16 февраля 1599 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ат сеа.

es.28 August 1538–16 February 1599: 28 de agosto de 1538–16 de febrero de 1599
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Treat nació el 28 de agosto de 1538, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Trott, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joanna Scadding, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Honour Lambert en 1563, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1599, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en En el mar.
